args:
set -eu
TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d)
cat >"$TMPDIR/ca.cnf" <<'EOF'
[req]
default_bits = 2048
prompt = no
default_md = sha256
distinguished_name = dn
x509_extensions = v3_ca

[dn]
CN = zeitgeist-test-ca

[v3_ca]
subjectKeyIdentifier=hash
authorityKeyIdentifier=keyid:always,issuer
basicConstraints = critical,CA:TRUE
keyUsage = critical,keyCertSign,cRLSign
EOF
cat >"$TMPDIR/server.cnf" <<'EOF'
[req]
default_bits = 2048
prompt = no
default_md = sha256
distinguished_name = dn
req_extensions = v3_req

[dn]
CN = localhost

[v3_req]
subjectAltName = @alt_names
basicConstraints = critical,CA:FALSE
keyUsage = critical,digitalSignature,keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth

[alt_names]
DNS.1 = localhost
IP.1 = 127.0.0.1
EOF
cat >"$TMPDIR/client.cnf" <<'EOF'
[req]
default_bits = 2048
prompt = no
default_md = sha256
distinguished_name = dn
req_extensions = v3_req

[dn]
CN = zeitgeist-client

[v3_req]
basicConstraints = critical,CA:FALSE
keyUsage = critical,digitalSignature,keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = clientAuth
EOF
openssl req -x509 -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout "$TMPDIR/ca-key.pem" -out "$TMPDIR/ca-cert.pem" -days 1 -config "$TMPDIR/ca.cnf" >/dev/null 2>&1
openssl req -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout "$TMPDIR/server-key.pem" -out "$TMPDIR/server.csr" -config "$TMPDIR/server.cnf" >/dev/null 2>&1
openssl x509 -req -in "$TMPDIR/server.csr" -CA "$TMPDIR/ca-cert.pem" -CAkey "$TMPDIR/ca-key.pem" -CAcreateserial -out "$TMPDIR/server-cert.pem" -days 1 -sha256 -extfile "$TMPDIR/server.cnf" -extensions v3_req >/dev/null 2>&1
openssl req -nodes -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout "$TMPDIR/client-key.pem" -out "$TMPDIR/client.csr" -config "$TMPDIR/client.cnf" >/dev/null 2>&1
openssl x509 -req -in "$TMPDIR/client.csr" -CA "$TMPDIR/ca-cert.pem" -CAkey "$TMPDIR/ca-key.pem" -CAcreateserial -out "$TMPDIR/client-cert.pem" -days 1 -sha256 -extfile "$TMPDIR/client.cnf" -extensions v3_req >/dev/null 2>&1
cargo run --quiet -- serve-peer-quic --bind 127.0.0.1:9553 --cert "$TMPDIR/server-cert.pem" --key "$TMPDIR/server-key.pem" --client-ca-cert "$TMPDIR/ca-cert.pem" >"$TMPDIR/server.log" 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!
trap 'kill "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf "$TMPDIR"' EXIT
sleep 2
cargo run --quiet -- peer-ping-quic --addr 127.0.0.1:9553 --server-name localhost --ca-cert "$TMPDIR/ca-cert.pem" --client-cert "$TMPDIR/client-cert.pem" --client-key "$TMPDIR/client-key.pem" >"$TMPDIR/ping.json"
TMPDIR_PATH="$TMPDIR" python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, pathlib
payload = json.loads(pathlib.Path(os.environ['TMPDIR_PATH'], 'ping.json').read_text())
assert payload['type'] == 'handshake_accepted', payload
assert payload['protocol_version'] == '0.1.0', payload
PY
